/usr/bin/ar qc libtrading_lib_cov.a CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Storage/MultisetOrderBookStorage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Engine/CoreEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Domain/order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Storage/BinaryOrderBookStorage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/UI/TradeTerminal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Concurrency/OrderQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Concurrency/Worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Concurrency/ClientSimulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Networking/Protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Networking/TcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Memory/OrderPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Routing/OrderRouter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_lib_cov.dir/src/Concurrency/SymbolWorker.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtrading_lib_cov.a
